---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Disk Cleaner
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Problem

What problem would this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think the feature should work.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative approaches you considered.

## Safety Considerations

Could this feature affect scanning, deletion, exclusions, duplicate detection, or user confirmation?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No
- [ ] Not sure

If yes, explain how the feature should remain safe and reviewable.

## Default Behavior

Should this feature be enabled by default?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No
- [ ] Not sure

Explain why.

## Additional Context

Add examples, screenshots, terminal output, or links that help explain the request.
